lines.english: Your place is forever True, O God.
True is the justice of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਚੁ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਵਰਤੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape sach dhaario sabh saachaa sache sach varateejaa he |4|
lines.english: He Himself is True, and true is all that He has established. True is the prevailing Order of the True Lord. ||4||
You alone are the greatest king.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸੁਖੁ ਕੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sachee kudarat sachee baanee sach saahib sukh keejaa he |5|
lines.english: True is Your Creative Power, and True is the Word of Your Bani. True is the peace which You give, O my Lord and Master. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਪਤੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar baahar sabh kichh jaanai aape hee aap pateejaa he |6|
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, You know everything; You Yourself are pleased with Yourself. ||6||
By the Hukam of Your Command, O True Lord, our affairs are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਵਡ ਰਸੀਆ ਤੂ ਵਡ ਭੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: too vadd raseea too vadd bhogee |
lines.english: You are the great party-goer, You are the great enjoyer.
You are detached in Nirvaanaa, You are the Yogi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਘਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਅਮਿਉ ਤੇਰੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sarab sookh sehaj ghar terai amiau teree drisatteejaa he |7|
lines.english: All celestial comforts are in Your home; Your Glance of Grace rains Nectar. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪੂਰ ਭੰਡਾਰੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਰਹੇ ਆਘੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: tott na aavai poor bhanddaarai tripat rahe aagheejaa he |8|
lines.english: Your treasures are overflowing, and are never exhausted; through them, we remain satisfied and fulfilled. ||8||
You alone give Your gifts.
You grant Your gifts unto all the beings of the world.
The Siddhas, seekers and forest-dwellers beg from You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਸਗਲ ਹੈ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: eik daataar sagal hai jaachik dehi daan srisatteejaa he |9|
lines.english: You alone are the Great Giver; all are beggars of You. You bless all the world with Your gifts. ||9||
The celibates and abstainers, and those who abide in peace beg from You.
In an instant, You establish and disestablish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਰੋ ਤੋਲੁ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਭਗਤੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: bhaaro tol beant suaamee hukam man bhagateejaa he |10|
lines.english: Your weight is so heavy, O my infinite Lord and Master. Your devotees surrender to the Hukam of Your Command. ||10||
Your devotees worship You with infinite love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: ohu gur kai sabad sadaa rang maanai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they enjoy Your Love forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਸੋਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis dehi daras soee tudh jaanai |
lines.english: They alone know You, whom You bless with Your Glance of Grace.
One who keeps You in his consciousness, becomes carefree and independent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਸਿਆਣਾ ਸੋਈ ਜੋ ਮਨਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਭਾਵੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: chatur saroop siaanaa soee jo man terai bhaaveejaa he |11|
lines.english: They alone are clever, handsome and wise, who are pleasing to Your Mind. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਸੋ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis cheet aaveh so saachaa saahaa |
lines.english: One who keeps You in his consciousness, is the true king.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉ ਕੇਹਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਕਹਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: jis cheet aaveh tis bhau kehaa avar kahaa kichh keejaa he |12|
lines.english: One who keeps You in his consciousness - what does he have to fear? And what else does he need to do? ||12||
The True Guru has mended the broken one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਗੀ ਅਮਿਉ ਝੋਲਿ ਝੋਲਿ ਪੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: surat sabad rid antar jaagee amiau jhol jhol peejaa he |13|
lines.english: Awareness of the Word of the Shabad has awakened within my heart. Shaking it and vibrating it, I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||13||
Thirst and desire are quenched, and one's inner being is cooled and soothed.
I have become immortal; I am eternal and imperishable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਭਰਮੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naa ko aavai naa ko jaavai gur door keea bharameejaa he |14|
lines.english: I do not come, and I do not go. The Guru has driven out my doubts. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: marai naahee sad sad hee jeevai |
lines.english: I shall not die; I shall live forever and ever.
One who is attached to the Perfect Lord, is immersed in the Perfect Lord.
Perfect is the Word of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਇਆ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਰੰਗਾ ਘਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੋਲੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: charrai savaaeaa nit nit rangaa ghattai naahee toleejaa he |15|
lines.english: His love increases day by day, and when it is weighed, it does not decrease. ||15||
When the gold is made one hundred percent pure,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਖਿ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਰਾਫੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਾਈਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: parakh khajaanai paaeaa saraafee fir naahee taaeejaa he |16|
lines.english: Assaying it, it is placed in the treasury by God the Jeweller, and it is not melted down again. ||16||
its color is true to the jeweller's eye.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੭॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: santasang mahaa sukh paaeaa dekh darasan ihu man bheejaa he |17|1|3|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, I have found great peace; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, this mind is pleased and satisfied. ||17||1||3||
Your Naam is Ambrosial Nectar, O my Lord and Master.
Nanak, Your slave, is forever a sacrifice to You.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Solhas:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਸਤ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਖਟੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਅਸਥਾਨਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur saasat simrit khatt karamaa gur pavitru asathaanaa he |1|
lines.english: The Guru is the Shaastras, the Simritees and the six rituals. The Guru is the Holy Shrine. ||1||
The Guru is merciful, and always forgiving.
The Guru is the Lord of the World, the Guru is the Master of the Universe.
